feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Just rewatched the original Jurassic Park and there's nothing inherently threate…
entry.content: Just rewatched the original Jurassic Park and there's nothing inherently threatening about the premise. The characters act like cloning dinosaurs is the equivalent of creating the atom bomb, when in reality there's no threat. Ignoring the fact that they could have chosen to limit the cloning to only herbivores if they wanted maximum security, what's the greatest threat that a rogue T-Rex actually poses? They can't rapidly reproduce, they can't overtake an urban environment, and presumably one ma
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: No surrender=afk
entry.content: If you refuse to surrender in an obvious unwinnable game, I will just sit there until you lose and you can waste your time. Just a reminder.... >you're not tough because you didn't surrender >you're not going to Valhalla because you didn't surrender >you're not a man because you didn't surrender >you don't make more money than me because you didn't surrender >you're not accomplishing anything meaningful because you didn't surrender Youre wasting your own time and everyone else's. The option is t
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: my mom is such a gay little bitch...she recently went on a trip to Japan, and wh…
entry.content: my mom is such a gay little bitch...she recently went on a trip to Japan, and when she got back, it was clear that she did not even appreciate going to Japan...i have wanted to go to Japan since i was a child, and i will never be able to go, and my mom goes to Japan and doesn't even give a fuck about going there, for her it was just one more dumb little outing, and she goes on many...i have to ask, i'm not even saying there is or isn't a God, i'm just curious, how much of a fucking faggot is thi
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Science fiction is asking "where would this take us if we did it for X amount of…
entry.content: Science fiction is asking "where would this take us if we did it for X amount of time/to the nth degree?". The answer behind these films is that a white man looked at arab culture and concluded even if one could magically think a hundred years into the future all they'll ever be capable of is religious war and genocide.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Mexican Governor Marina del Pilar Ávila leaking audio
entry.content: The Governor of Baja California, Marina del Pilar Ávila Olmeda, is currently facing a major political scandal following the leak of audio recordings where she can be heard negotiating with intermediaries and alleged FBI agents. According to investigative journalism reports, the governor offered to share classified information from Mexico's national security meetings in exchange for halting criminal charges, sanctions, and a potential extradition order against her.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /int/ International: Seriously, why does their government hate white people now?
entry.content: >be me >try to do some bureaucracy (city hall, land office, etc) >years ago they would’ve been polite, professional, and helpful >now they speak in rude Japanese (no desu/masu), aren’t helpful, and basically act like DMV sheboons from America >then they’ll flip around entirely and act obsequiously towards some jeet who doesn’t speak any japanese and didn’t bring a translator At first I thought they were just taking out their frustrations on whites, because the other races would just get violent,
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I'm on OlauncherCF, and it's the best "minimalist" launcher IMHO. UnLauncher is …
entry.content: I'm on OlauncherCF, and it's the best "minimalist" launcher IMHO. UnLauncher is a close second, and max comfy, though it has performance issues on newer versions of Android, so it's probably not worth checking out for most people. Have tried at least two-dozen "minimalist" launchers over the years and haven't found any that come close to those two. All the others seem to range from bugfests to bloatfests (including most other OLauncher forks), and the OG OLauncher has been freemium trashware for
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How did LLMs replace coders but is shockingly bad at basically every other use-c…

entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: My wife and I constantly get spam and scam phone calls and so does everyone else…
entry.content: My wife and I constantly get spam and scam phone calls and so does everyone else we know. Some of these calls are garden variety spam, but some are sophisticated phishing attempts by people who did their homework on me presumably by background checking my phone number. We want to buy a SIP trunk that can receive calls only and use a home Linux server to answer the line. This number can only receive calls and if anyone ran a background check on it, it would come back to the VoIP company we bought
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Android
entry.content: What is the new popup notification thing that keeps blocking my entire screen on my phone for 5 seconds at a time every single time an app has a notification, and how do I stop it? I'll be using the internet browser, even in the middle of typing something, and suddenly a banner will pop up on top of what I'm doing to deliver a notification in the middle of the screen in the middle of me doing something else, while the entire rest of the screen is covered and blocked out by some kind of grey blur
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >ISP CGNAT'D me just a few days ago It's so over > Yes—the Tailscale journal con…
entry.content: >ISP CGNAT'D me just a few days ago It's so over > Yes—the Tailscale journal contains enough evidence. Your connection appears to have moved to CGNAT on July 10, 2026, at approximately 22:59 UTC. How could they do this. I was so happy having port forwarding.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Arguably the strongest malware engine ever built, and it edged out Bitdefender i…
entry.content: Arguably the strongest malware engine ever built, and it edged out Bitdefender in one recent AV-Comparatives test (99.8% vs. 99.5%). However, government restrictions and trust concerns in several countries mean many people no longer recommend it universally despite its technical excellence. Common Sense as antivirus is a fucking retarded concept, so don't bring your bullshit culture here.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3006
entry.content: >Juicy Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: IMO, gay bottoms should be fat. Everybody knows the old saying "more cushion for…
entry.content: IMO, gay bottoms should be fat. Everybody knows the old saying "more cushion for the pushin," and it's true that for a girl, thick thighs and a fat ass make the experience of sex more physically enjoyable. What's yet to be universally recognized is that the same holds true for men. Nobody ACTUALLY wants to pound against the bony pelvis of a skinny twink. You want a nice, comfortable, padded assfucking, and a big guy with a big ass and big thighs gets the job done. Honestly your bottom should hav
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Daisy Edgar-Jones gaming movie "Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow" sets November 2027 release
entry.content: >Gabrielle Zevin’s best-selling novel tells the story of two friends whose lives first intersect in childhood and college, and follows them over several decades as they become creative partners in the video game business of the 1990s-2000s. The plot centers on Sadie Green, played by Daisy Edgar-Jones, a brilliant game designer, and her co-collaborator Sam Masur, as well as Sam’s roommate and friend Marx Watanabe, as they build a video game studio called Unfair Games. https://variety.com/2026/fil
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.content: sup /b/ So I spent a lot of time on here in the late 2000s and early 2010s when I was in middle/high school, and as a result of all the rule 34 I developed a huge fucking thing for cartoon chicks, as well as all the weird ass fantasies that you'd expect comes with that. Now I was able to get my shit together and learned how to be normal, started banging chicks, actually got to act out a lot of my fantasies irl, etc. Basically I thought it was behind me. Then last night I got drunk and decided to
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Can't we use AI to create emulators?
entry.content: >Get a few unreal engine 5 games. >Here are the binaries of those games for PC >Here are the binaries of the same games for PS5 >Find where the code execution diverts, and create a tool to connect a PS5 code into the windows code. >Get an exclusive PS5 game, profit. It should be this easy no?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Windows features that Linux doesn't have: Native video casting
entry.content: How to cast a video from your laptop to your connected display without having to interact with the display or media player: Windows: >just right click the MKV file and select "cast to device" >select which device to cast to >video is beamed to display and begins playing immediately >enjoy video! Linux: >right click MKV file on your Linux desktop >become confused because it's 2026 and Linux can't cast video natively >google around for an hour or two to find out how to cast a video from your deskt
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: We're gonna be rich! Rich! Rich!
entry.content: https://techcrunch.com/2026/07/14/d eepseek-reportedly-in-talks-to-rais e-1-5b-then-ipo/ >July 14 (Reuters) - Chinese AI startup DeepSeek is weighing raising new funds one month after closing its first round and has begun preparations for an initial public offering, according to media reports on Tuesday. >The company started preliminary talks this week with new investors about opening another round that would value the company at about $71 billion before the deal, according to the Financial Time
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /news/ News: House passes Trump-backed bill that would make daylight saving time permanent
entry.content: https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/co ngress/house-passes-bill-daylight-s aving-time-permanent-sunshine-prote ction-rcna587531 Efforts in Congress to make daylight saving time permanent sprang forward Tuesday after the House passed legislation that would remove the need for Americans to adjust their clocks twice a year. The measure, known as the Sunshine Protection Act, passed 308-117. It would put the country on the time currently observed from March to November unless a state exempted itself bef
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /o/ Auto: What do i need to know/learn in order to ride my aprilia tuareg safely?
entry.content: My mom only let me get this aprilia tuareg if i promised to only ride it in our neighborhood for a while. So far ive been riding very gingerly and trying to err on the side of caution but i feel like if im too cautious that is not optimal. I got a 1” lower oem comfort seat for it which i think is good bc im only 6’1 and avg lankyness. I always feel like motorcycles (at least the pretty ones) are kind of like the midget police bc midgets and ppl with short arms/legs cant touch the ground when the
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Early FC History
entry.content: The [s4s] national soccer team played their first match on July 12, 2013, against the /gd/ board in the 2013 Summer Cup Friendlies. A total of 301 fans witnessed the new team go 3-0 down before Shrek grabbed a consolation goal, which turned out to be their first goal in their club history. [s4s] met /b/ eight days later in another 2013 Summer Cup Friendly. The match, packed with action and butthurt on the /b/ side, saw [s4s] grab their first win in their history with a 1-0 win. Quads scored the
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /news/ News: Elon Musk’s $1M Wisconsin voter giveaway likely was illegal, panel finds
entry.content: https://thehill.com/homenews/state- watch/5968466-elon-musk-election-br ibery/ A bipartisan elections panel found that billionaire Elon Musk likely violated Wisconsin’s election bribery law when he handed out $1 million checks to voters during the state’s Supreme Court election last year. The Wisconsin Election Committee voted 5-1 last week to refer two complaints against Musk to the Brown County district attorney’s office after finding probable cause that the giveaways broke the state’s electio
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /b/ Random: I met him on a Monday and my heart stood still Da doo ron-ron-ron, Da doo ron-ro…
entry.content: I met him on a Monday and my heart stood still Da doo ron-ron-ron, Da doo ron-ron Somebody told me that his name was Bill Da doo ron-ron-ron, Da doo ron-ron
